---
title: "Methrix"
output: html_document
params:
    methrix_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_EMseq/Methrix/h5_raw/
    DMRS_DM1: Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/DMR/DMRS_DM1_PatientsControls.csv
    isa_file: C:/Users/Casper.deVisser/Documents/ipsc-data-analysis/20240822_Xomics_iPSC_Neurons_new_READ-ONLY.xlsx
    outdir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/results/DMPK_Methylation/
    mae_hdf5_path: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/h5MAE
---

```{r}
library(methrix)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(pheatmap)
```


```{r}
print(params)
```


```{r}
outdir <- params$outdir

if (!dir.exists(outdir)){
  outdir <- getwd()
}
```


## Read in Methrix object from shared disk
```{r}
meth <- methrix::load_HDF5_methrix(params$methrix_dir)
```


## Select ISA file to get correct sample IDs
```{r}
isa_assay_prot <- readxl::read_xlsx(params$isa_file, sheet = 'Assay - proteomics')
```


```{r}
library(MultiAssayExperiment)
library(HDF5Array)

mae <- loadHDF5MultiAssayExperiment(
  dir = params$mae_hdf5_path, 
  prefix = 'mae')

phenotype_data <- as.data.frame(colData(mae))
```


## Select DMPK DM1 locus
```{r}
## CTG repeat coordinates: 45,770,205-45,770,264
## 26 CpG sites: 488-777 upstream of this
meth_DMPK_subset <- methrix::subset_methrix(m = meth, regions = data.table(chr='chr19', start = 45764750, end =45784750))

#meth_DMPK_subset <- methrix::subset_methrix(m = meth, regions = data.table(chr='chr19', start = 45755000, end =45780000))
```

```{r}
source_paths <- c(
  "../support_functions/ReadMethrix2Df.R",      # when running in Rstudio
  "ReadMethrix2Df.R"                            # when running in Nextflow
)

for (path in source_paths) {
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    source(path)
    break
  }
}
```


## Combine with pheno df
```{r}
df_DMPK_list <- read_meth2df(meth_DMPK_subset, isa_assay_prot)
df_DMPK <- data.frame(t(df_DMPK_list[[1]]))

phenotype_data <- phenotype_data[rownames(df_DMPK),]

df_DMPK$Phenotype <- phenotype_data$phenotype
df_DMPK$Sample <- phenotype_data$observation.unit.identifier.crispr
df_DMPK$Sample <- phenotype_data$sample.description
```


## Remove CHD2 and NANS samples
```{r}
df_DMPK <- df_DMPK[df_DMPK$Phenotype %in% c("Healthy", "Diseased: DM1", "Rescue: repeat excised CRISPR DM1"),]

## TODO: Fix column in original colData(mae)
df_DMPK[df_DMPK$Phenotype == "Rescue: repeat excised CRISPR DM1", "Sample"] <- 'DM1_Rescue'
```


## Plot methylation in the DMPK region
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=4}
df_long <- df_DMPK %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("chr19_"),
    names_to = "Genome_Location",
    values_to = "Measurement"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Genome_Location = as.numeric(gsub("chr19_", "", Genome_Location)))

df_avg <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Phenotype, Genome_Location) %>%
  summarize(Avr_Beta =  mean(Measurement), .groups= "drop")

df_avg_Sample <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Sample, Genome_Location) %>%
  summarize(Avr_Beta =  mean(Measurement), .groups= "drop")
```


```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=4}
df_avg_Sample_26CpG <- df_avg_Sample[df_avg_Sample$Genome_Location > 45770752 & df_avg_Sample$Genome_Location < 45771041, ] 
n_CpG <- length(unique(df_avg_Sample_26CpG$Genome_Location))

ggp <- ggplot(df_avg_Sample_26CpG, aes(x = Genome_Location, y = Avr_Beta, color = Sample, group = Sample)) +
  geom_line(size=1) +
  labs(title = paste0(n_CpG, ' beta-values measured upstream of the CTG repeat'), 
       x= 'GenomeLocation',
       y ='Beta-value') +
  coord_cartesian(ylim =c(0, 1)) +
  theme_bw()
ggp
ggsave('Meth_DMPKrep_26CpG.pdf', ggp, width = 12, height = 6)
```


## Smoothen plot by taking average of every 10 CpG sites
```{r}
df_binned <- df_avg_Sample %>%
  mutate(bin = Genome_Location %/% 200) %>%
  group_by(bin, Sample) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_beta = mean(Avr_Beta),
    bin_start = min(Genome_Location),
    bin_end = max(Genome_Location),
    .groups = "drop")


df_binned <- df_binned %>%
  mutate(bin_center = (bin_start + bin_end) / 2)

```


## DMRs
```{r}
dmrs_sign <- read.csv(params$DMRS_DM1, row.names=1)
dmrs_sign

# 20 kb region
start <- 45764750
end <- 45784750

# DMRs in this region
dmrs_sign_chr19 <- dmrs_sign[dmrs_sign$chr == 'chr19',]
dmrs_sign_chr19_DMPK_20kb <- dmrs_sign_chr19[dmrs_sign_chr19$start >= start & dmrs_sign_chr19$end <= end,] 
```



## Plot complete 20k region
```{r, fig.width=16, fig.height=5}
dmrs_plot_data <- dmrs_sign_chr19_DMPK_20kb %>%
  mutate(ymin = -0.1,
         ymax = -0.05,
         xmid = (start + end) / 2,
         ymid = (ymin - ymax / 2))

ggp <- ggplot(df_binned, aes(x = bin_center, y = avg_beta, color = Sample, group = Sample)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  
  # Repeat grey rectangle
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = 45770200, xmax = 45770264, ymin = -0.1, ymax = -0.05),
            fill = "lightgrey", color = 'black', alpha = 0.05, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  annotate("text", x = 45770230, y = -0.02, label = "Rep",
           color = "black", size = 3) +
  
  # Indicate DMRs
  geom_rect(data = dmrs_plot_data,
            aes(xmin = start, xmax = end, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
            fill = "blue", color = "black", alpha = 0.3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Labels for each DMR (numbers from dataframe)
  geom_text(data = dmrs_plot_data,
            aes(x = xmid, y = ymid, label = nCG),
            color = "black", size = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  labs(title = paste0(n_CpG, " beta-values measured upstream of the CTG repeat"), 
       x = "GenomeLocation",
       y = "Beta-value") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.1, 1)) +
  theme_bw()

ggp

ggsave('Meth_DMPKrep_20k_CLONES.pdf', ggp, width = 18, height = 4.5)
```



## Zoom in to DMR regions
```{r, fig.width=16, fig.height=5}
rep_min <- 45770200
rep_max <- 45770264

df_binned_zoomin <- df_binned[df_binned$bin_start > 45766500 & df_binned$bin_end < 45771500, ]


df_binned_broken <- df_binned_zoomin %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  arrange(bin_center) %>%
  mutate(
    bin_center = ifelse(
      lag(bin_center) < rep_min & bin_center > rep_max, NA, bin_center
    )
  )


ggp <- ggplot(df_binned_broken, aes(x = bin_center, y = avg_beta, color = Sample, group = Sample)) +
  geom_line(size = 1, na.rm = T) +
  
  # Repeat grey rectangle
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = rep_min, xmax = rep_max, ymin = -0.1, ymax = 0.3),
            fill = "lightgrey", color = 'black', alpha = 0.3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  annotate("text", x = 45770230, y = 0.1, label = "DMPK Repeat",
           color = "black", size = 4, angle =90) +
  
  # Indicate DMRs
  geom_rect(data = dmrs_plot_data,
            aes(xmin = start, xmax = end, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
            fill = "blue", color = "black", alpha = 0.3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Labels for each DMR (numbers from dataframe)
  geom_text(data = dmrs_plot_data,
            aes(x = xmid, y = ymid, label = nCG),
            color = "black", size = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  labs(title = paste0("Beta-values measured upstream of the CTG repeat"), 
       x = "GenomeLocation",
       y = "Beta-value") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.1, 1)) +
  theme_bw()

ggp

ggsave('Meth_DMPKrep_DMRs.pdf', ggp, width = 18, height = 4.5)
```


## Heatmap of DMRs
## Select DMPK DM1 locus
```{r}
## CTG repeat coordinates: 45,770,205-45,770,264
## 26 CpG sites: 488-777 upstream of this
meth_DMPK_subset <- methrix::subset_methrix(m = meth, regions = data.table(chr='chr19', start = min(as.numeric(dmrs_sign_chr19_DMPK_20kb$start)), end = max(as.numeric(dmrs_sign_chr19_DMPK_20kb$end))))

## Combine with pheno df
df_DMPK_list <- read_meth2df(meth_DMPK_subset, isa_assay_prot)

df_DMPK <- data.frame(t(df_DMPK_list[[1]]))

phenotype_data <- phenotype_data[rownames(df_DMPK),]

df_DMPK$Phenotype <- phenotype_data$phenotype
df_DMPK$Sample <- phenotype_data$sample.description

## Remove CHD2 and NANS samples
df_DMPK <- df_DMPK[df_DMPK$Phenotype %in% c("Healthy", "Diseased: DM1", "Rescue: repeat excised CRISPR DM1"),]
```

```{r}
ggp <- pheatmap(
    df_DMPK[, c(1:374)],
    cluster_rows = T,
    cluster_cols = F,
    show_colnames = F,
    show_rownames = T,
    labels_row = df_DMPK$Sample,
    main = "Heatmap of DMRs"
)
ggsave('Meth_DMRs_Heatmap.pdf', ggp, width = 12, height = 10)
```


## Only repeat locus
```{r, fig.width=17, fig.height=4}
df_avg_Sample_rep <- df_avg_Sample[df_avg_Sample$Genome_Location > 45770100 & df_avg_Sample$Genome_Location < 45770350, ] 
n_CpG <- length(unique(df_avg_Sample_rep$Genome_Location))

ggp <- ggplot(df_avg_Sample_rep, aes(x = Genome_Location, y = Avr_Beta, color = Sample, group = Sample)) +
  geom_line(size=1) +
  geom_rect(aes(xmin=45770200, xmax =45770264, ymin = -0.1, ymax = 0),
            fill = "lightgrey", alpha =0.05) +
  annotate("text", x = 45770230, y = -0.01, label = "Rep", color = "black", size =3) +
  labs(title = paste0(n_CpG, ' beta-values measured around the CTG repeat'), 
       x= 'GenomeLocation',
       y ='Beta-value') +
  coord_cartesian(ylim =c(0, 0.6)) +
  theme_bw()

ggp
ggsave('Meth_DMPKrep.pdf', ggp, width = 13, height = 5)
```
